title: Sour Crispy Ethiopian Beef Stir-fry
description: This low-fat-friendly sour and crispy dish features beef stock concentrate to create a flavorful base for your stir-fry.
instructions: In a wok or large pan, heat the beef stock concentrate until it starts to foam.
Add the tomato sauce and cayenne pepper, stirring well. Let it simmer for about 5 minutes.
Dice the garlic finely and add it to the mixture with the red bell pepper slices. Stir in until softened.
Stir in the fermented black olives until they release their liquid. Simmer for an additional minute.
Season with salt and pepper if needed, then remove from heat and serve hot.
